emails.subject: RE: Clorox
emails.body: RE: Clorox I wanted to go through the comments on the ISDA that we received from Clorox to make sure I understand them fully. To: Cyprow, Jarrod

emails.subject: Clorox
emails.body: Can you get together today to discuss Clorox and the meeting you had with credit last week? I have a meeting today at 11:00 but other than that I am wide open, so just let me know what works for you. Thanks, Jarrod Cyprow Enron Forest Products 1400 Smith Houston, TX 77002 (713) 853-5700 jcyprow@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Clorox
emails.body: RE: Clorox bad day To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: Clorox
emails.body: What time and day works for you? To: Cyprow, Jarrod
